prompt: "Song Dynasty Social Media Feed", a humorous fusion of ancient and modern interface design style. The image simulates a mobile social media interface, but the content is entirely Song Dynasty scenes. The profile picture is a portrait of a Song Dynasty scholar. Username: "Su Shi SuShi_Official". Posted content: "Just arrived in Huangzhou; exiled but in a decent mood. Made Dongpo Pork myself today, the taste is amazing. Recipe attached:". The attached picture is a close-up of Dongpo Pork in a traditional fine-brush painting style. Like list: "Huang Tingjian, Qin Guan, Foyin and 126 others". Comment section: "Wang Anshi: Hehe", "Sima Guang: Still that same flavor". Interface elements like the like icon are replaced with Song Dynasty patterns. Status bar shows "Great Song Mobile 5G" and "Third Year of Yuanfeng". The color scheme is a mobile dark mode paired with elegant Song Dynasty tones. A masterpiece of historical and social media collision.
